prompt:
Unique, collectible NFT character in MFKZ cartoon style. 
Background: Abandoned church overrun with graffiti and overgrowth. 
Head: Head covered in faint graffiti markings, no eyes. 
Eyes: Eyes with a subtle twin sparkle, adds alertness and intensity. 
Clothing: Chunky puffer with three-tone panels. 
Color: Over-saturated electric red. 
Species: Glitch Variant. 
Only visible text: 'VERT'. 
Bold outlines, cel-shading, flat colors, no gradients, no photorealism.
